paper_id_hint: Boyer-Moore 快速字符串搜索算法 (1977)

tables.purpose: 展示不同模式长度下，算法在三种不同源字符串（随机二进制、英文文本、100字符随机字母表）中，每经过一个字符平均引用的字符串次数（即参考文献次数）。

rows.verbatim: In Figure 1 the average number of references to string per character in string passed is plotted against the pattern length for each of three source strings.
For example, for an English pattern of length 5, the algorithm typically inspects 0.24 characters for every character passed.
In Figure 1 the average number of references to string per character in string passed is plotted against the pattern length for each of three source strings.

tables.purpose: 展示不同模式长度下，算法在三种不同源字符串中，每经过一个字符平均执行的机器指令数。

rows.verbatim: In Figure 2 the average number of instructions executed per character passed is plotted against the pattern length.
For example, in the English sample, less than 1 instruction per character is executed for patterns of length 5 or more.
In Figure 2 the average number of instructions executed per character passed is plotted against the pattern length.

quantitative_claims.claim: For a random English pattern of length 5, the algorithm will typically inspect i/4 characters of string before finding a match at i.
For an English pattern of length 5, the algorithm typically inspects 0.24 characters for every character passed.
quantitative_claims.metric_name: number of references to string per character in string passed

quantitative_claims.claim: In the English sample, less than 1 instruction per character is executed for patterns of length 5 or more.
quantitative_claims.metric_name: average number of instructions executed per character passed

quantitative_claims.claim: In the English sample, less than 1 instruction per character is executed for patterns of length 5 or more.
quantitative_claims.metric_name: average number of instructions executed per character passed

quantitative_claims.claim: The simple search algorithm references string about 1.1 times per character passed (determined empirically with the English sample above).
quantitative_claims.metric_name: number of references to string per character passed

quantitative_claims.claim: The simple string searching algorithm (when coded with a 3-instruction fast loop) executes about 3.3 instructions per character (determined empirically on the English sample above).
quantitative_claims.metric_name: average number of instructions executed per character passed
quantitative_claims.condition: English sample, simple algorithm with 3-instruction fast loop

quantitative_claims.claim: The average cost (in our implementation) ranges from 160 instructions (for strings of length 1) to about 500 instructions (for strings of length 14).

Knuth has recently shed some light on this question. In [5] he proves that the execution of the algorithm (after preprocessing) is linear in i + patlen, assuming the availability of array space linear in patlen plus the size of the alphabet.
quantitative_claims.condition: worst case, assuming array space linear in patlen plus alphabet size

quantitative_claims.claim: In particular, he shows that in order to discover that pat does not occur in the first i characters of string, at most 6 * i characters from string are matched with characters in pat.
quantitative_claims.metric_name: number of character matches in worst case
quantitative_claims.condition: worst case, to discover pat does not occur in first i characters

conditions_and_parameters.verbatim: We used this program to select 300 patterns of length patlen, for each patlen from 1 to 14.

conditions_and_parameters.parameter_name: number of test patterns per length
conditions_and_parameters.verbatim: We used this program to select 300 patterns of length patlen, for each patlen from 1 to 14.
we performed this experiment for three different kinds of source strings, each of length 10,000.
The first source string consisted of a random sequence of 0's and 1's.

conditions_and_parameters.value_range: English text obtained from an online manual
conditions_and_parameters.verbatim: The second source string was a piece of English text obtained from an online manual.

conditions_and_parameters.value_range: random sequence of characters from a 100-character alphabet
conditions_and_parameters.verbatim: The third source string was a random sequence of characters from a 100-character alphabet.

conditions_and_parameters.value_range: set to an integer large which is greater than stringlen + patlen
conditions_and_parameters.verbatim: delta0(pat(patlen)) is set to an integer large which is greater than stringlen + patlen
It should be explained that our code uses a block transfer instruction to clear the 128-word delta1 table at the beginning of ...

tried_and_rejected.what: 使用 delta1 表实现无限字母表
tried_and_rejected.outcome: 在最坏情况下，访问 delta1 可能需要 order patlen 条指令，显著降低算法速度。
tried_and_rejected.rejection_reason: Hence the algorithm as it stands almost certainly does not run in time linear in i + patlen for infinite alphabets.

tried_and_rejected.what: 省略 delta1 表（仅使用 delta2）
tried_and_rejected.outcome: Knuth 已证明，当省略 delta1 时，算法在最坏情况下仍在线性时间内运行，且适用于无限字母表。
tried_and_rejected.rejection_reason: Doing this, however, will drastically degrade the performance of the algorithm on the average.

procedural_steps.sequence_name: Boyer-Moore 搜索算法（含 fast loop 和 slow loop）

steps.description: 初始化：设置 stringlen 为字符串长度，i 为 patlen。如果 i > stringlen，返回 false。
steps.verbatim: stringlen ,-- length of string. i ,-- patlen. top: if i > stringlen then return false.

steps.description: fast loop：从字符串当前位置 i 获取字符 char，根据 delta0(char) 增加 i。如果 i <= stringlen，重复 fast loop。
steps.note: delta0(pat(patlen)) 被设置为一个大于 stringlen + patlen 的大数，以便在匹配到模式最后一个字符时跳出循环。
steps.verbatim: fast: i ,--- i + delta0(string(i)). if i <- stringlen then goto fast.

steps.description: undo：如果 i <= large，返回 false（表示未找到模式）。否则，恢复 i 的值：i = (i - large) - 1，并设置 j = patlen - 1。
steps.verbatim: undo: if i <- large then return false. i ,-- (i - large) - 1. j ,-- patlen - 1.

steps.description: slow loop：如果 j == 0，返回 i + 1（找到匹配）。如果 string(i) == pat(j)，则 j--, i--，重复 slow loop。否则，进入下一步。
steps.verbatim: slow: ifj = 0then returni + 1. if string(i) = pat(j) then j*.-j-1. i*-.-i-1. goto slow. close;

steps.description: 发生不匹配时，计算新的 i 值：i = i + max(delta1(string(i)), delta2(j))，然后跳转到 top 重新开始。
steps.note: delta1 基于不匹配字符，delta2 基于已匹配的后缀。
steps.verbatim: i ,~- i + max(deltal(string(i)), deltaz(j)). goto top.

procedural_steps.sequence_name: 预处理：构建 delta1 表

steps.description: 对于字母表中的每个字符 char，如果 char 不在 pat 中，则 delta1(char) = patlen；否则，delta1(char) = patlen - j，其中 j 是满足 pat(j) = char 的最大整数。
steps.verbatim: deltas(char) = If char does not occur in pat, then patlen; else patlen - j, where j is the maximum integer such that pat(j) = char.

procedural_steps.sequence_name: 预处理：构建 delta2 表

steps.description: 对于 j 从 1 到 patlen，计算 rpr(j)（最右端可能重现的位置），定义为满足以下条件的最大 k (k <= patlen)：子串 [pat(j+1)...pat(patlen)] 与 [pat(k)...pat(k+patlen-j-1)] 可统一，并且要么 k <= 1，要么 pat(k-1) != pat(j)。
steps.note: 统一（unify）意味着两个序列长度相同，且对应位置字符相等或至少有一个是特殊字符 $（$ 不出现在 pat 中）。
steps.verbatim: Finally, we define the position of the rightmost plausible reoccurrence of the terminal substring which starts at position j + 1, rpr(j), for j from 1 to patlen, to be the greatest k less than or equal to patlen such that [pat(j + 1) ... pat(patlen)] and [pat(k) ... pat(k + patlen - j - 1)] unify and either k -< 1 or pat(k - 1) :~ pat(j).

information_gaps.gap: 用于生成图 1 和图 2 的原始数值数据（表格形式）。报告仅提供了图表和部分数值描述（如 0.24, 0.473, 0.266），但未提供所有模式长度下的精确平均值。
information_gaps.impact: 无法精确复现图 1 和图 2 的曲线，也无法进行精确的定量比较。
information_gaps.likely_reason: 作者可能认为图表足以传达趋势，或者原始数据量过大不便于在论文中列出。

information_gaps.gap: 用于测试的英文文本（online manual）的具体来源和内容。
information_gaps.impact: 无法复现实验，因为英文文本的统计特性（如字母频率、单词分布）会影响算法性能。
information_gaps.likely_reason: 作者可能认为文本来源是通用的，或者出于篇幅考虑未详细说明。

information_gaps.gap: 用于测试的随机二进制和 100 字符字母表字符串的具体生成方式（如种子、随机数生成器）。
information_gaps.likely_reason: 作者可能认为随机序列的统计特性足够通用，或者未记录种子。

information_gaps.gap: PDP-10 实现中 fast loop 的具体汇编代码（除了提到的 3 或 4 条指令的伪代码）。
information_gaps.impact: 无法精确复现指令计数实验。
information_gaps.likely_reason: 作者可能认为伪代码足以说明实现思路，或者出于篇幅考虑未列出完整汇编代码。

information_gaps.gap: delta2 表预处理算法的具体实现细节和复杂度。报告提到 Knuth 展示了线性时间算法，但未给出具体实现。
information_gaps.impact: 无法独立实现高效的 delta2 表构建。
information_gaps.likely_reason: 论文的重点是搜索算法本身，预处理算法的细节在参考文献 [5] 中。

information_gaps.gap: 用于测试的 300 个模式的具体选择方式（随机子串的起始位置是否完全随机？是否允许模式重叠？）。
information_gaps.impact: 可能影响测试结果的代表性。
information_gaps.likely_reason: 作者可能认为这些细节对结果影响不大，或者未详细记录。
